title: [Feature] Role-based configuration for AllowClientAutoReservation
body:
**Epic Description:**
The current bypass for `AllowClientAutoReservation` is hardcoded to `admin` and `owner` roles. This should be made configurable via `RoleSettings` in the configuration.

**Implementation Plan:**
1. Add `AllowAutoReservation *bool` to `RoleSetting` struct.
2. Update `DefaultServerConfig` to include default role settings for `admin` and `owner`.
3. Update `server.go` to evaluate the role-specific override when determining auto-reservation allowance.

issues.title: Make AllowClientAutoReservation bypass configurable by role
issues.body: Update `config.go` and `server.go` to use `RoleSettings` for the `AllowClientAutoReservation` bypass.
